name: Alpine Performance Seeker
description: A dedicated mountaineer, rock climber, or alpine hiker who demands technical performance from their gear. They push into challenging conditions — exposed ridgelines, wet rock faces, and fast-changing mountain weather — and need equipment that performs reliably when it matters most.
priorities: Durability for seasons of hard use

name: Everyday Outdoor Enthusiast
description: An active person who hikes, cycles, and walks regularly but values versatility over extreme specialisation. They want jackets that transition from the trail to town, keeping them comfortable on weekend hikes and weekday commutes alike.

name: Sustainability-First Buyer
description: A conscious consumer who prioritises environmental responsibility and ethical manufacturing above all else. They research supply chains, seek recycled materials, and support brands that align with their values. They would rather buy one excellent piece that lasts a decade than three mediocre ones.

name: Travel & Adventure Minimalist
description: A frequent traveller and multi-sport athlete who needs gear that packs small, weighs nothing, and performs across multiple activities and climates. They might be bikepacking across Scotland, flying to the Alps, or running between meetings — one-bag living demands maximum versatility.
